'''Rhain Towith''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed the [[Kadok Regions/Legends|Kadok Regions]] during the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. Although Towith was officially on good terms with [[Guiteica/Legends|Guiteica]], the Moff was at a loss as to how they could bring the native [[Bitthævrian/Legends|Bitthævrians]], and especially the [[m'Yalfor'ac Order]], under Imperial control.<ref name="AIR" />

{{Char-stub}}
